name: Broccoli Sprout-Tofu Spread on Toast
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon white rice miso, or brown rice miso
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mash the tofu with a fork until it is thoroughly mixed.
2. Add the miso, tahini, and lemon juice to the mashed tofu and stir until well combined.
3. Lightly chop the broccoli sprouts.
4. Fold the chopped broccoli sprouts into the tofu mixture.
5. Spread the mixture thickly on each slice of toast.
6. Top with additional broccoli sprouts, if desired.
7. Store refrigerated in a covered jar.
